complaints.message:
Confirm object synset assignment.
Object assigned to synset: coconut.n.01
Definition: the edible white meat of a coconut; often shredded for use in e.g. cakes and curries
Reminder: synset should match the object and not its contents.
(e.g. orange juice bottle needs to match orange_juice__bottle.n.01
and not orange_juice.n.01)
complaints.complaint: half the fruit and not just the meat
